subject: [OOM] Fixing k8s resources and limits
commit_message:
[OOM] Fixing k8s resources and limits

This fix is adjusting OOM helm charts components resources limits and requests

Issue-ID: OOM-3199

Signed-off-by: Vladimir Turok <vladimir.turok@t-systems.com>
Change-Id: I56aeba925cda4984277ac7bbf23cfd158263d30f

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6857/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6857/ )
